taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [IFBC8J, lxIjd, 8Dg5ndOz, qc2002, WNMYgM1G, 5hVVkGC4, mDXBHDo, 4qQC2, 9LlWsep, 9IG0h, 0YgN1d7s, SVOfL, x28hM, lTOcDEx, faU4gJs, gqueFTqQ, ywMKfiUJ, laoCS, 91O1Z, rRUALt, CA6lyB, 925xtA, hYbMPFf, ywoTpj, nTYjJ0, RETUPMOC, hYwcyTw, 9KzcgwEd, zWbnVs, M3dAKJ, PqZhJ, RjFAh8Jv, 4Dhocl, hRfMfDpk, pAfCs7, 1Addo1x, yClgX, xfPz74kH, cQcB1XqH, mTZctTic, mlkaOEe, lJdbRz, mmb8NK6, I3ztgyww, OWVS1si0, PcLvtP2, XtHVQ8, efiZeWNn, JFVou1f, 2JCw5]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
